title: SERVICE clause not working with limits higher than 1
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE buildings (id UInt32, geometry String, measuredHeight Float64);
INSERT INTO buildings (id, geometry, measuredHeight) VALUES (1, 'geometry1', 14.07), (2, 'geometry2', 15.20);
CREATE TABLE heights (building_id UInt32, height Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY building_id;
SELECT b.id, h.height FROM buildings b JOIN heights h ON b.id = h.building_id LIMIT 2;
key_bug_features: SERVICE clause fails with limit greater than one
